column1: Hey Emma, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Could I have the total price with taxes and fees for 4?
Cool yea I got you! which destination were you lookin to book
Punta Cana and Cancun! most affordable and most popular
I'll send both, which school are y'all from
Loved “Punta Cana and Cancun! most affordable and most popular”
Firee Emory is lit I've only heard good things
y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
okay bet yea! I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
yea for sure I got you
whats the best email to send it all to
Let me know once you send!
just sent that over lmk if you got it
I only see a quote for 4 nights
looks like the link duplicated, will update!
Hi we're going to do March 9-14 5 nights at the occidental punta Cana. Can you send me an updated link?
Also if I'm going to paying on behalf of everyone's package, how can I go about that?
hey okay cool I'll set that up. and, I can set up your account so that you can make one payment, and then we'll disperse the payments into everyones slots
will work on this in a sec and then walk you through it
gonna hook you each up with the free booze cruise event too!
sending over! did you want to pay everyones full balance, or just the deposit?
deposit is the $200 for each person
hey so just sent over the reservation!
when you hop in, click access reservation, select join this trip, and you'll see the very first slot in the room has the total balance of $3196. if you can, hop into that slot
when you hit join trip on that slot, itll take you through the process of setting up your account, and then making the payment
Liked “when you hit join trip on that slot, itll take you through the process of setting up your account, and then making the payment”
no so the 200 would have went towards the total. the total each person is $799 flat
799 x 4 = the $3196.00 total in full that you'll be putting on one card
Yes I'm going to book later this afternoon
I just paid using that link but for some reason 1 of the slots says temporary reserved an TBA and it won't let me change it
those will clear. usually temp reserve means someone clicked it and didnt finish making the account
once it opens up though your friends can slot in the open slots
I see one of them has gotten started
Yes can you clear it on your end
yo Em! is Catherine on the same flight as the rest of you?
Hey yes! Should I have her add her flight info still?
I also think we are going to do the booze cruise!
okay cool I'll add that in too
Loved “okay cool I'll add that in too”
Looks like the booze cruise. Should be $75 though
I'll update that on your accounts in a few
thats all set now, just the $75 balance

Hey! We're so excited for tomorrow! I have a few questions- we decided to do the club package instead of the booze cruise, can we still switch and pay upon arrival? Do we need to have the vouchers printed to check into the hotel/be transported to hotel?
Hey, gonna be lit! You can screenshot our vouchers to show the party pass desk when you arrive
Is it possible to switch the booze cruise to one of the party packages?
Liked “Hey, gonna be lit! You can screenshot our vouchers to show the party pass desk when you arrive”
looks like you already have the booze cruise on your package actually. I hooked you up with it since you deposited before your initial deadline
so we can add one night party pass instead. wanna do Imagine Cave?
Could we switch it to coco bongo on Wednesday?
its too late to switch anything right now, so keep the booze cruise, and buy the party pass when you get here, if youd like. no need to add anything to your package or pay for anything else
looks Iike Justine paid for one party pass night. she'll have an Imagine Cave ticket in her vouchers
Since we can't switch I think we're going to pay for the same thing as Justine, if you could add that balance back to our accounts
So we can either do the booze cruise or the Cave since it's the party package for Tuesday?
you'll be able to do both events. ones during the day and ones at night
I'll add those in rn just will need to pay it off asap before you depart for your flight so that you can see the vouchers
Ok and it's just the $75 right?
Unless you would be able to refund Justine for the booze cruise so that we can add Coco bongo to our accounts
word Justine has coco bongo now. the rest of you can grab it when you get here
Amazing so we can download the vouchers now and pay for coco bongo upon arrival
Yea you'll have the booze cruise vouchers, Justine will have a coco bongo voucher included too
Everyone except for Justine downloaded vouchers so the 3 of us will have to buy it once we arrive
She'll need those to redeem the passes so she can log in and screenshot them
